Add south perimeter building BP_Building_44 ──\nbp44_cls = unreal.load_class(None, \"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_Building_44.BP_Building_44_C\")\nsx, sy = 1200, -5500\nif bp44_cls and is_clear(sx, sy, 800):\n    gz = ground_z(sx, sy)\n    a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(bp44_cls, unreal.Vector(sx, sy, gz))\n    if a:\n        a.set_actor_label(\"BP_Building_44_South\")\n        results.append(f\"SPAWNED BP_Building_44 south ({sx},{sy},{gz:.0f})\")\n    else:\n        results.append(f\"FAIL BP_Building_44\")\nelse:\n    results.append(f\"SKIP BP_Building_44 ({sx},{sy}) cls={bool(bp44_cls)} clr={is_clear(sx,sy,800)}\")\n\nwith open(\"/tmp/round4_result.txt\", \"w\") as f:\n    f.write(\"\\n\".join(results))\n"}}
